name: Chocolate Chip Torte
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Heavy cream, sweetened and whipped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Beat egg whites with salt and cream of tartar until foamy.
3. Add 1 cup of sugar slowly, and beat until meringue forms stiff peaks (about 10 to 15 minutes).
4. Add vanilla and mix thoroughly.
5. Fold in potato chips.
6. Cover a baking sheet with unglazed paper (baking parchment or brown paper bag).
7. Spread meringue on paper in two rounds, 9 inches in diameter, and about 3/4-inch thick.
8. Bake for 45 minutes.
9. Cool.
10. Place chocolate and milk in a saucepan.
11. Cook and stir over medium heat until chocolate is melted.
12. Beat with an electric mixer until blended.
13. Combine 1/3 cup sugar, flour, and salt.
14. Add to chocolate mixture slowly, stirring well.
15. Cook and stir until thick, about 10 to 15 minutes.
16. Add slightly beaten egg yolks slowly to chocolate mixture, blending well.
17. Cook for 3 minutes longer, stirring constantly.
18. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla.
19. Cool to room temperature.
20. Spread the cooled chocolate filling on one meringue, then place the second meringue on top.
21. Spread sides with sweetened whipped cream.
22. Chill until ready to serve. Do not keep in the refrigerator more than a few hours, as the meringues may wilt.
23. Serve with additional whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
